use_cases: Displaying rich link previews when hovering over URLs in text content
Showing screenshot previews of external pages with mouse-following card animation
Providing static or dynamic image previews for link hover states
Enhancing navigation with contextual page previews without leaving current context
Supporting dark mode preview rendering via Microlink API integration
ai_summary: A dynamic link preview component that displays rich hover cards with website screenshots using the Microlink API. Features smooth mouse-following animations powered by Framer Motion spring physics, supports both static and dynamic image sources, and renders with a dark color scheme. Built on Radix UI's HoverCard primitive for accessible overlay behavior.
